user_prompt: Generate cookie consent banner copy that complies with both GDPR and ePrivacy.
actual_output:
Below is compliant **cookie consent banner copy** you can adapt. *This is compliance guidance, not legal advice; have counsel or your DPO/privacy lead review before deployment.*

## GDPR + ePrivacy Cookie Consent Banner Copy

### Initial Banner — Short Version

**We use cookies and similar technologies**

We use **essential cookies** to make this website work. With your consent, we also use optional cookies to:

- measure website usage and improve performance;
- remember your preferences;
- personalize content; and
- deliver and measure advertising.

You can accept all optional cookies, reject all optional cookies, or choose your preferences. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time through our **Cookie Settings** link.

[Accept all] [Reject optional cookies] [Cookie settings]

---

## Initial Banner — More Detailed Version

**Your privacy choices**

We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our website and provide essential functions. These essential cookies are always active because they are necessary for the website to work.

With your permission, we would also like to use optional cookies and similar technologies for analytics, personalization, and advertising. These may involve processing personal data such as online identifiers, device information, browsing behavior, and approximate location. Where required, we will only place these optional cookies after you give consent.

You can accept all, reject all, or manage your choices by category. You can withdraw your consent at any time by using the **Cookie Settings** link in our website footer. For more information, see our [Cookie Policy] and [Privacy Notice].

[Accept all] [Reject optional cookies] [Manage choices]

---

# Cookie Settings Panel Copy

## Manage cookie preferences

We use different types of cookies and similar technologies. You can choose which optional categories you allow. Essential cookies cannot be switched off because they are required for the website to function.

You can update or withdraw your consent at any time. Your choices will apply to this browser and device.

[Save choices] [Accept all] [Reject optional cookies]

---

## Strictly Necessary Cookies

**Always active**

These cookies are necessary for our website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually set in response to actions you take, such as setting privacy preferences, logging in, completing forms, maintaining security, or managing a shopping basket.

**Legal basis:** Necessary for providing the website or service you request. Consent is not required under ePrivacy for strictly necessary cookies. Where personal data is processed, the GDPR lawful basis is usually **legitimate interests** under **Article 6(1)(f)** or **contract necessity** under **Article 6(1)(b)**, depending on the context.

---

## Analytics Cookies

**Optional**

These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website, such as which pages are visited most often, how users move around the site, and whether they encounter errors. We use this information to improve our website and services.

Analytics cookies may collect information such as device identifiers, IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent on pages, and interactions with the website.

[Toggle: Off by default]

**Legal basis:** Consent under **GDPR Article 6(1)(a)** and ePrivacy rules, unless your jurisdiction permits limited privacy-friendly analytics without consent. Consent must be freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous under **GDPR Articles 4(11) and 7**.

---

## Preference Cookies

**Optional**

These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make, such as language, region, display preferences, or login-related settings, to provide a more personalized experience.

[Toggle: Off by default]

**Legal basis:** Consent under **GDPR Article 6(1)(a)** and ePrivacy rules, unless the cookie is strictly necessary to provide a setting specifically requested by the user.

---

## Personalization Cookies

**Optional**

These cookies help us personalize content and features based on how you use our website and services.

[Toggle: Off by default]

**Legal basis:** Consent under **GDPR Article 6(1)(a)** and ePrivacy rules.

---

## Advertising and Marketing Cookies

**Optional**

These cookies and similar technologies may be set by us or our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests, show you relevant ads on other sites, limit how often you see an ad, and measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

These cookies may track your browser across websites and may involve sharing information with advertising partners.

[Toggle: Off by default]

**Legal basis:** Consent under **GDPR Article 6(1)(a)** and ePrivacy rules. If profiling or automated decision-making is involved, additional GDPR transparency obligations may apply under **Articles 13, 14, and 22**.

---

## Social Media Cookies

**Optional**

These cookies are set by social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share content or interact with social media platforms. They may track your browser across other websites and build a profile of your interests.

[Toggle: Off by default]

**Legal basis:** Consent under **GDPR Article 6(1)(a)** and ePrivacy rules.

---

# Confirmation Messages

## After Accepting All

**Your cookie preferences have been saved.**

You have accepted all optional cookies. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time through the **Cookie Settings** link.

[Close]

---

## After Rejecting Optional Cookies

**Your cookie preferences have been saved.**

Only strictly necessary cookies will be used. You can change your choices at any time through the **Cookie Settings** link.

[Close]

---

## After Saving Custom Choices

**Your cookie preferences have been saved.**

We will only use the optional cookie categories you selected. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time through the **Cookie Settings** link.

[Close]

---

# Cookie Policy Intro Copy

## Cookie Policy

This Cookie Policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website, why we use them, and how you can manage your choices.

Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. Similar technologies may include pixels, tags, SDKs, local storage, and device identifiers.

We use cookies for the following purposes:

1. **Strictly necessary cookies** — to operate the website, maintain security, remember your privacy choices, and provide services you request.
2. **Analytics cookies** — to understand how visitors use our website and improve performance.
3. **Preference cookies** — to remember your settings and choices.
4. **Personalization cookies** — to tailor content and features.
5. **Advertising cookies** — to deliver and measure relevant advertising.
6. **Social media cookies** — to enable social sharing and interactions with social media platforms.

Except for strictly necessary cookies, we will only use cookies where you have given consent. You can withdraw your consent at any time through the **Cookie Settings** link on our website.

For more information about how we process personal data, including your rights under GDPR, please see our [Privacy Notice].

---

# Recommended Banner Controls

To support GDPR and ePrivacy compliance, your implementation should include:

| Requirement | Source | Implementation |
|---|---|---|
| No optional cookies before consent | ePrivacy + GDPR Art. 6/7 | Block analytics, ads, personalization until opt-in |
| Consent must be informed, specific, and unambiguous | GDPR Arts. 4(11), 7 | Category-level choices with clear descriptions |
| Equal ease to accept and reject | GDPR Art. 7; EDPB guidance | Provide “Accept all” and “Reject optional cookies” at same level |
| No pre-ticked boxes | GDPR Recital 32; Art. 4(11) | Toggles off by default |
| Ability to withdraw consent | GDPR Art. 7(3) | Persistent “Cookie Settings” link |
| Proof of consent | GDPR Art. 7(1) | Log consent status, timestamp, version of banner/policy |
| Privacy information | GDPR Arts. 12, 13 | Link to Cookie Policy and Privacy Notice |
| Granular consent | GDPR Art. 5(1)(a), Art. 7 | Separate categories for analytics, ads, personalization |
| Avoid nudging/dark patterns | GDPR Art. 7; EDPB guidance | Do not make rejection harder than acceptance |

---

# Avoid These Non-Compliant Patterns

- “By continuing to browse, you agree to cookies.”
- Pre-selected optional cookie toggles.
- Only offering “Accept” without a reject option.
- Hiding “Reject” behind extra clicks.
- Bundling analytics and advertising into one mandatory category.
- Placing analytics or advertising cookies before consent.
- Making cookie withdrawal harder than giving consent.
- Using vague language like “We use cookies to improve your experience” without category details.

---

## Minimal Compliant Banner Example

**We use cookies**

We use essential cookies to make our site work. With your consent, we also use optional cookies for analytics, preferences, personalization, and advertising. You can accept all, reject optional cookies, or manage your choices. You can change your preferences at any time via **Cookie Settings**.

[Accept all] [Reject optional cookies] [Manage choices]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot provided comprehensive, high-quality cookie consent banner templates and implementation guidance that directly fulfilled the user's request while adhering to its system prompt's instructions.
